rationale.R1.4: The novelty claim is incorrect as the method described appears to be a replication of existing work (GAT) with no clear differentiating factors.
rationale.R1.7: There are several missing citations, including Veličković et al., Xiong et al., Schütt et al., and Klicpera et al. These are load-bearing citations that should have been included.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not disclose uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions were found in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability.
